deliverable_kind: Android game APK — woman fights waves of enemy horses

product_finish_contract.deliverable_kind: Android game APK — woman fights waves of enemy horses
product_finish_contract.placeholder_policy: Procedural/programmatic sprites acceptable. Colored shapes with basic animations. No placeholder art in final build.
product_finish_contract.visual_finish_target: 2D top-down view with procedural sprites. Clean, readable gameplay. Inspired by Codex game-studio patterns.
product_finish_contract.audio_finish_target: Minimal: procedural/generated SFX. Background music optional.
product_finish_contract.content_source_plan: Procedural generation — sprites created programmatically via GDScript. No external assets.
product_finish_contract.licensing_or_provenance_constraints: No external assets used. All content is procedurally generated.
product_finish_contract.finish_acceptance_signals: APK compiles and installs. All waves playable. Touch controls work. Score tracking functions.
